---
title: "Empirical Wasserstein Barycenters: Riemannian Optimization Guarantees"
date: "2024-10-01"
categories: [Talks, Optimal Transport]
description: "Presented at the Applied Mathematics and Statistics Student Seminar, JHU."
---
Discussed Riemannian optimization guarantees for empirical Wasserstein barycenters at the JHU AMS Student Seminar.
